architecture.rationale: The checked M0/C1-C12 partition determines modules. Canonical state and side effects have one child owner; orchestration, helpers, adapters, and facades cannot become alternate writers.

target_modules.rationale: M0 owns orchestration order and evidence joins only; it cannot write a child canonical field.
C1_authorization_coverage is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C2_source_registry is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C3_evidence_qualification is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C4_person_entity_resolution is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C5_event_temporal_trace is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C6_matter_formation_admission is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C7_lifecycle_board_state is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C8_open_loop_waiting_blocking is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C9_completion_cancellation_reopen is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C10_correction_revocation is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C11_guard_artifact_prediction is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
C12_projection_bilingual_ui is the unique model and code owner for its declared canonical fields and side-effect boundary.
authorization scope value objects only; C1 coverage remains writer
pure extraction helpers; C3 owns evidence qualification writes
role value objects; C4 owns identity and role writes
trace assembly helpers; C5 owns Event and MaterialClue temporal writes
MaterialClue and activity values; C5 owns writes and C12 owns projection
context and placement values; C6 owns reconciliation admission writes
Matter entities; C6 owns admission and membership writes
relationship values; no automatic causal inference
blocking value helpers; C8 remains the only writer
compute invalidation plans; C10 owns append and dispatch
deletion request values; C10 owns append and propagation
validate advisory receipt freshness; C11 owns advisory registry
forecast values only; never writes current canonical state
pure semantic-depth assessment helpers; C11 owns persisted depth status
paged occurrence/change-set values; C1 owns tracking and C2 owns freshness writes

indexed ObjectCoverageLedger projection and bounded orphan/reference repair plus exact compressed noncurrent history storage; C1 remains the coverage-policy owner and logical migration never owns VACUUM
deterministic value/neighborhood selection-plan values whose semantic identity excludes scan-only inventory revision; C2 remains the current content-selection writer

strict already-read Gmail body continuation leaf; C1 owns exact manifest/batch/status-specific admission, C2 owns SourceVersion/body receipts or the explicit no-text disposition, C3 owns anchors or no-text evidence not-applicable, and M0 owns coverage pointers; the leaf has no semantic or model writer

provider workflow coordinator; Gmail metadata-owner reconciliation requires C1 exact current inventory/coverage admission, delegates the minimal SourceVersion to C2, preserves deeper bodies, and never becomes an evidence, semantic, Matter, or projection owner
single-parent containment and atomic batch values that require the exact C6-admitted matter_id; C6 remains the canonical Matter/hierarchy writer
narrative formatting; C12 owns projection revision
language rendering; C12 owns semantic equivalence status
indexed page selection and visible-card hydration; C12 owns catalog and detail projection behavior
generated-hero values and private asset access; C12 owns current hero projection
real image and document derivatives for the Images evidence gallery only
Provider-neutral discovery/read contracts own no canonical state.
Metadata-first local discovery, bounded child partitioning, and content reads delegate tracking and coverage to C1 and freshness to C2.
The C1-delegated coordinator checkpoints bounded directory scopes without becoming a second authorization or coverage owner.
Gmail pagination and reads cannot send, delete, archive, or change labels.
Bounded document and spreadsheet extraction emits source parts and gaps only.
Image metadata, OCR, and inference remain distinct evidence modalities.
Cloud placeholder metadata never proves content was read.
One abstract ResearchOperation binds ResearchGuard only when its exact external identity is current.
Durable private repositories live under MATTERS_HOME and implement owner interfaces.
Private immutable source bodies never enter the repository.
Background work executes bounded owner requests; it never owns final verification.
The immutable app-local Skill Pack declares exact consumer identities.
Resolves bundled, machine-installed, and active-view layers without mutating them.
Only Matters-managed machine projections may be synchronized automatically.
Delegates to one MatterService path and owns no business-success branch.
Delegates to one MatterService path and owns no business-success branch.
Delegates to one MatterService path and owns no business-success branch.

groups.rationale: Product group accounts only M0/C1-C12 canonical and presentation state. Private execution identities never enter this group.
A0/A1/A2/A3 execution profiles, concrete execution identities, raw handles, resource use, and terminal receipts are private runtime state; only a qualified C11 admission crosses into product state.
Bundled/local skill selection and execution receipts are private runtime state and are not product canonical fields.
M0_matters_end_to_end_authority is the unique writer partition.
C1_authorization_coverage is the unique writer partition.
C2_source_registry is the unique writer partition.
C3_evidence_qualification is the unique writer partition.
C4_person_entity_resolution is the unique writer partition.
C5_event_temporal_trace is the unique writer partition.
C6_matter_formation_admission is the unique writer partition.
C7_lifecycle_board_state is the unique writer partition.
C8_open_loop_waiting_blocking is the unique writer partition.
C9_completion_cancellation_reopen is the unique writer partition.
C10_correction_revocation is the unique writer partition.
C11_guard_artifact_prediction is the unique writer partition.
C12_projection_bilingual_ui is the unique writer partition.
A0_matters_source_analysis_operation is the unique writer partition.
A1_matters_research_operation is the unique writer partition.
A2_matters_maintenance_orchestrator_operation is the unique writer partition.
A3_matters_ai_gateway_operation is the unique writer partition.
S0_matters_skill_runtime is the unique writer partition.
S1_skill_bundle_inventory is the unique writer partition.
S2_skill_compatibility is the unique writer partition.
S3_active_skill_resolution is the unique writer partition.
S4_matters_managed_skill_sync is the unique writer partition.
S5_skill_validation_rollback is the unique writer partition.
C1 delegates bounded private partition checkpoint storage without transferring authorization or aggregate coverage ownership.
The two fixed language fields are retired in favor of one BCP-47 locale-keyed localized-values field.

Real source imagery is direct-migrated only to Images-gallery fields. Representative/card-visual selection fields are retired without value migration; new generated-hero work starts from current Matter identity and theme.

Scan-bound selection identity, copied anchor-id lists, inline noncurrent coverage history, and unadmitted projection identity are direct-migrated to their single current authorities without compatibility readers or fallback paths.

field_lifecycle.notes: Current fields are direct current-authority fields. The retired projection.english and projection.zh_CN fields migrate directly to projection.localized_values. Real-source visual fields migrate only to Images-gallery fields; old card-visual values never become generated heroes. There are no aliases, fallback readers, compatibility paths, or unknown old-field dispositions. Scan-bound selection identity, copied anchor-id lists, inline coverage history, and unadmitted projection identity have explicit one-way bounded migration dispositions with no startup or VACUUM owner. Hierarchy-bearing fields declare their exact M0 stage and whether old and new ancestor-chain invalidation is required.

synthetic_source_inventory.claim_boundary: This inventory is fully synthetic and proves only declared case coverage; it does not prove provider access or runtime conformance.

claim_boundary: G4 proves design inventory, unique ownership, finite universes, and exact planned evidence ownership. It does not prove code, tests, provider conformance, synthetic E2E, live private sources, UI, or release.
